name: General Store
description: Empty general store that used to sell supplies to adventurers, now has no goods to sell
visualDescription: Roofless wooden store with empty shelves

interactions.name: Browse Empty Shelves
interactions.description: Look through the empty shelves that once held adventure supplies

name: Healer's Hut
description: Small healer's hut that used to treat injured adventurers and villagers, now has no patients
visualDescription: Roofless hut with herb racks and empty beds

interactions.name: Sort Dried Herbs
interactions.description: Sort through the surplus dried herbs that are no longer needed for treating battle wounds

name: Blacksmith's Workshop
description: Smithy that forged the hero's legendary sword, now only produces household cutlery
visualDescription: Roofless smithy with anvil and pile of spoons

interactions.name: Forge a Spoon
interactions.description: Hammer a new metal spoon for household use

name: Village Square
description: Central open square where villagers gather to chat and pass time
visualDescription: Open grassy area with a stone well

interactions.name: Sit on the Bench
interactions.description: Sit on the wooden bench in the square to rest and watch others pass by
